basics.name: Jaiyabharat S
basics.label: Product & Technology Leader
basics.summary: Technology & Product Leader with 12+ years of experience bridging the gap between Complex Enterprise Engineering and Business Strategy. Expert in Open-Source Enterprise Stacks, RegTech/Tax Compliance, and AI-Native Product Development. Proven track record of architecting scalable platforms for regulated markets and driving cost-efficient delivery through open-source adoption. Unique ability to lead cross-functional teams while writing hands-on prototypes (Python/LLMs) to accelerate decision-making and reduce engineering discovery time. Experienced in zero-to-one launches, international market expansion, and transforming legacy systems into modern revenue-generating platforms.

skills.name: Technical Fluency
keywords: GenAI & LLMs (RAG, Agents, Local Deployment - Llama/Qwen/IBM Granite)

work.summary: Skyvera and Amsum were executed as client contracts under my sole-proprietorship, Covai Labs — used for accuracy and background verification purposes.
highlights: Client: Skyvera (US Contract) - July 2024 – September 2025: Spearheaded the technical strategy, product execution, and modernization for a telecom AI suite, revitalizing a legacy portfolio

Legacy System Lifecycle Management: Formulated and executed a version deprecation strategy for an SMS center product suite, seamlessly migrating clients to a single, supported latest version while operating within existing SLAs and contract constraints

AI Feature Ideation & Strategy: Ideated and defined requirements for AI-focused capabilities. Conceptualized Kandy Notetaker (UCaaS integration for call transcription, diarization, and AI-driven insights/summaries) and Lithium Defender (LLM-based phishing detection layer for the SMS center)

AI-Native Product Launch: Architected and launched AI-native products (including Kandy Notetaker for meeting intelligence & Lithium Defender for spam detection), extending the lifecycle of legacy UCaaS systems and opening new revenue streams
Platform Strategy: Defined unified product vision to consolidate 11 fragmented software versions, reducing technical debt by 85% and enabling faster feature iteration

Technical Roadmap Ownership: Championed infrastructure modernization initiative from Oracle to PostgreSQL, eliminating $2M+ annual licensing costs to reinvest in customer-facing innovation while maintaining 99.9% uptime
Product Discovery: Accelerated time-to-market by 60% by prototyping LLM concepts (Claude Code, Cursor) to validate user value before engineering commitment
Customer Experience: Designed and launched self-service portals with embedded RAG AI agents, which automated release note distribution and deflected support tickets

Cross-Functional Leadership: Operated as the central technical liaison coordinating between engineering, DevOps, commercial, and customer support teams, authoring detailed technical specifications that prioritized API scalability
Client: Amsum Technologies (Contract) - November 2023 – May 2024: Managed the end-to-end development lifecycle for two MVP products: a Live Shopping application and a Garage Management Portal

work.summary: Owned the product lifecycle for a Fintech/RegTech SaaS platform, driving international expansion and compliance.
highlights: RegTech Strategy & Global Expansion: Led the product roadmap for entering stringent international markets (KSA, UAE), ensuring the platform met complex data sovereignty and cryptographic signing requirements

Platform Scalability: Collaborated with architects to redesign a core high-throughput transaction engine for reconciliation across Banking, Insurance, and E-commerce, supporting a 350% increase in volume

Customer Success & MVP: Built MVP solutions for each industry use-case, personally conducting capability demos for prospective leads and onboarding key accounts for initial User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
User Adoption & Growth: Achieved an 80% increase in platform adoption and a 350% increase in web traffic by conducting user research to identify friction points and redesigning the onboarding flow
Cross-Functional Enablement: Reduced internal team ramp-up time by 50% by establishing a structured knowledge framework that aligned Inside Sales, Support, Development, and QA teams
GTM & Sales Enablement: Spearheaded marketing initiatives, lead generation, and conducted technical sales presentations and POC demos, accelerating the enterprise sales cycle

work.summary: Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative, validating the concept through pilots and securing 3 enterprise contracts before General Availability (GA).
highlights: New Product Development: Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative, validating the concept through pilots and securing 3 enterprise contracts before General Availability (GA)
Cloud Solution Design: Collaborated with technical architects to define cloud-based solutions (AWS) that addressed complex business challenges, ensuring technical feasibility matched business goals
Conversion Optimization: Partnered with design and engineering to implement ML-driven user flows, resulting in a 10% increase in conversion rates for client platforms
Presales & Marketing: Led marketing efforts and cross-functional presales activities, delivering tailored sales presentations and technical product demos to secure enterprise contracts

work.summary: Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts that reduced service desk ticket resolution time by 30%, directly improving SLA adherence.
highlights: Process Automation: Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts that reduced service desk ticket resolution time by 30%, directly improving SLA adherence
Knowledge Management: Architected a centralized knowledge repository for the team, streamlining daily operations, standardizing edge-case handling, and reducing onboarding time by 40%

work.summary: Initiated and executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments to CentOS Linux, LibreOffice, and other OSS.
highlights: Open Source Infrastructure Initiative: Initiated and executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments to CentOS Linux, LibreOffice, and other OSS. This eliminated legal compliance risk, saved $50k+ in licensing fees, and reduced malware incidents to zero
Performance Leadership: Managed a team of 18 agents, improving Service Level Agreement (SLA) delivery by 35% through rigorous data-driven performance metrics

work.summary: Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints, gathering critical threat signature data to refine McAfee's detection algorithms.
highlights: Security Specialization: Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints, gathering critical threat signature data to refine McAfee's detection algorithms
Performance Excellence: Exceeded performance targets by 120% for a major U.S. credit bureau client, maintaining high customer retention rates

courses: Process Engineering: Formalized placement operations by drafting a 'constitution' of SOPs
Strategic Initiative: Established the 'Corporate Readiness' club to separate training delivery from recruitment operations
Project Excellence: Project rated 'Excellent' by HAL
Leadership: Founding member and coordinator of the Department Club; organized symposiums and technical summits

highlights: Startup Enablement: Advised and supported a cohort of 15 startup teams in the pre-incubation phase on market analysis, product development, and business strategy
Workshops & Training: Initiated and conducted educational sessions equipping incubatees with strategic frameworks and methodologies for successful business development
